No, the cash will not be refunded under: No, the cash will not be refunded under any circumstances, as per government regulations.
How do I pay the monthly advance payment: How do I pay the monthly advance payment?
The monthly advance payment for the purc: The monthly advance payment for the purchase of jewelry must be made by the 10th of every month. Payments can be made through Cash, Credit/Debit Cards, NEFT/RTGS, UPI transfers, Local Cheque, PDC, or DD in favor of 'CSC Jewellery Pvt. Ltd.' Online payments can be made through our website www.cscjewellers.com or by downloading the CSC Jewellery Mobile App.
If you discontinue within 6 months of en: If you discontinue within 6 months of enrollment, you will not be eligible for a discount on wastage (VA). If you discontinue during the 9th month, you will be entitled to an 80% discount on the wastage (VA), limited to the accumulated gold weight under the plan.
What if I do not pay continuously?: What if I do not pay continuously?
You will be eligible for no wastage (VA): You will be eligible for no wastage (VA) on purchases only if you have made all the advance payments continuously. Any default in monthly payments will lead to the discontinuation of the plan.
What if I purchase jewelry exceeding the: What if I purchase jewelry exceeding the accumulated amount or gold weight?
If you purchase jewelry that exceeds the: If you purchase jewelry that exceeds the accumulated amount or gold weight, the wastage (VA) applicable will be borne by you for the excess amount or weight.
Yes, you can purchase gold coins without: Yes, you can purchase gold coins without wastage (VA) or making charges.
What will happen after the completion of: What will happen after the completion of the plan period?
After completing eleven months from the: After completing eleven months from the date of enrollment, you will be eligible to buy gold jewelry of your choice with no wastage (VA) up to 18%, restricted to the accumulated value or gold weight.
Can this plan be combined with other off: Can this plan be combined with other offers?
No, this plan is unique and cannot be co: No, this plan is unique and cannot be combined with any other existing schemes or offers.
Will wastage (VA) be charged on special: Will wastage (VA) be charged on special items?
Yes, wastage (VA) will be charged on spe: Yes, wastage (VA) will be charged on special items like ethnic jewelry, vintage jewelry, pooja items, silver articles, silver jewelry, and other special items not included in this estimate.
How do I know the amount accumulated?: How do I know the amount accumulated?
The accumulated amount will be updated i: The accumulated amount will be updated in your customer receipt book or mobile app on a monthly basis at the time of making the advance payment.
Can I make all the monthly payments in a: Can I make all the monthly payments in advance?
No, monthly payments cannot be carried o: No, monthly payments cannot be carried over or paid in advance.
Can I make the advance monthly payments: Can I make the advance monthly payments in CSC showrooms?
Yes, as of now, we have only one branch: Yes, as of now, we have only one branch located in Nellore. You can make the monthly advance payments at the CSC showroom in Nellore or through the CSC Jewellers mobile app, available on the Play Store and the Apple Store.
Can I purchase special items like ethnic: Can I purchase special items like ethnic and vintage jewelry and pooja items?
Yes, you can purchase special items with: Yes, you can purchase special items with applicable wastage (VA) and making charges.
Yes, gold coins can be purchased with up: Yes, gold coins can be purchased with up to a 50% discount on wastage (VA).
You must make the monthly advance paymen: You must make the monthly advance payment by the 10th of every month. Payments can be made via Cash, UPI, or Demand Draft in favor of “CSC Jewellers.” You may also use the CSC Jewellers Mobile App for online payments.
What if I purchase jewelry exceeding the: What if I purchase jewelry exceeding the accumulated amount?
Can I purchase watches in this plan?: Can I purchase watches in this plan?
Is the monthly advance amount fixed or v: Is the monthly advance amount fixed or variable?

Before you create an account, please rea:
Before you create an account, please read
and accept our Terms & Conditions.
1: The monthly advance for the purchase of jewelry must be equal and paid continuously for 11 months. The advance payment cannot be extended beyond the 11th month and is non-transferable under any circumstances.
2: Upon completion of 11 months from the date of enrollment, the customer will be eligible to purchase the selected jewelry with a 100% discount on wastage (VA) for any jewelry with wastage (VA) up to 18%, limited to the accumulated value.
3: Whenever there is a rate reduction offer on gold jewelry (e.g., Rs. 50 less per gram), the discount will be applied only to the prevailing gold rate.
4: The monthly advance scheme for the purchase of jewelry is available starting from the ₹5,000 plan and above.
5: The monthly advance for the purchase of jewelry must be paid by the 10th of every month. The advance amounts paid will not be eligible for any interest.
6: Any monthly advance exceeding ₹15,000 will not be accepted in cash and must be paid through Demand Draft (DD) or UPI. A member cannot combine multiple jewelry purchase plan accounts to buy a single piece of jewelry if the monthly advance payments for those accounts were made in cash or UPI.
7: Customers are required to bring their receipt book each month while paying the advance amount and must surrender it at the time of purchasing jewelry. This requirement applies only to cash transactions.
8: Customers who choose to pre-close the scheme within 6 months of enrollment will not be eligible for any scheme benefits and should purchase jewelry equivalent to the pre-closure amount, without availing any scheme-related discounts or offers.
9: If the customer discontinues the scheme during the 7th or 8th month of enrollment, they will be entitled to a 30% discount on wastage (VA) for any jewelry, provided the wastage (VA) is up to 18% and limited to the accumulated value.
10: If the customer discontinues the scheme during the 9th month, they will be entitled to a 40% discount on wastage (VA) for any jewelry with wastage (VA) up to 18%, limited to the accumulated value.
11: If the customer discontinues the scheme during the 10th month, they will be entitled to a 50% discount on wastage (VA) for any jewelry with wastage (VA) up to 18%, limited to the accumulated gold value.
12: KYC is mandatory to enroll in the plan. In case of a change of address or loss of the customer receipt book, the customer must inform the company immediately and apply for a new receipt book with updated KYC details.
13: The customer must appoint a nominee at the time of submitting KYC details. If the nominee is a minor, the nominee’s legal guardian shall sign and act on behalf of the nominee.
14: Payments of the monthly advance for the purchase of jewelry beyond the stipulated period, or payments for more than one month at a time, will not be allowed.
15: The advance for the purchase of jewelry can be paid, and the customer can take delivery of the selected jewelry at the CSC Jewellers showroom in Nellore.
16: The advance for the purchase of jewelry can be made through cash, Demand Draft (DD), or UPI. Payments can be made either at the CSC Jewellers showroom in Nellore or by using the CSC Jewellers mobile app.
17: Any balance advance amount will not be refunded in cash and can only be adjusted against the purchase of gold or silver coins.
18: Customers will be eligible for a 100% discount on wastage (VA) for any jewelry with wastage (VA) up to 18%, only after successfully completing all 11 monthly advance payments without any interruption. If there is any default in the monthly payments, the customer will not be allowed to continue in the scheme. Therefore, it is mandatory for the customer to make all advance payments continuously without fail.
19: The customer can purchase jewelry from the 10th month of enrollment or at any time before 345 days from the date of enrollment. If the jewelry is not purchased within 345 days, the customer's scheme amount will be refunded via registered post to the address linked with their Aadhaar.
20: If the customer purchases jewelry exceeding the accumulated amount, the applicable wastage (VA) on the excess amount must be paid by the customer.
21: Under this scheme, no interest will be paid on the amounts contributed by customers. Customers can only purchase jewelry equivalent to the amount they have paid.
22: GST and if any other applicable government taxes on all sales transactions at the time of purchase or delivery must be borne by the customer.
23: Costs related to diamonds and other stones are not included under this scheme. Such charges shall be borne separately by the customer. The scheme provides waiver only on wastage charges and does not cover any other additional costs.
24: The customer's signature will be verified at the time of delivery of the goods.
25: The company, at its sole discretion, reserves the right to alter, amend, modify, or add to any of the terms and conditions from time to time.
26: All disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of the competent court in Nellore.
The monthly advance for the purchase of: The monthly advance for the purchase of jewelry must be equal and paid continuously for 11 months. The advance payment cannot be extended beyond the 11th month and is non-transferable under any circumstances.
Upon completion of eleven months from th: 2. Upon completion of eleven months from the date of enrollment, the customer will be eligible to purchase the selected jewelry with a 100% discount on wastage (VA) for any jewelry with wastage (VA) up to 18%,  limited to the accumulated value/weight
Whenever there is a rate reduction offer: Whenever there is a rate reduction offer on gold jewelry (e.g., Rs. 50 less per gram), the discount will be applied only to the prevailing gold rate.
The monthly advance for the purchase of: The monthly advance for the purchase of jewelry must be paid by the 10th of every month. The advance amounts paid will not be eligible for any interest.
Any monthly advance exceeding Rs. 17,000: Any monthly advance exceeding Rs. 17,000 per month will not be accepted in cash and must be paid via DD, debit cards, credit cards, NEFT/RTGS, UPI, local cheques, or PDC cheques. A member cannot use multiple jewelry purchase plan accounts to purchase a single piece of jewelry if the monthly advance payments for those accounts were made in cash.
Customers will have to bring the custome: Customers will have to bring the customer receipt book every month when paying the advance amount and should surrender it at the time of purchasing jewelry.
Customers who choose to discontinue with: Customers who choose to discontinue within 6 months of enrollment will not be eligible for any benefits or discounts on wastage (VA) and can only redeem the accumulated weight/value under the plan by paying 100% wastage (VA).
If the customer discontinues during the: If the customer discontinues during the 7th or 8th month of enrollment, the member will be entitled to a 30% discount on wastage (VA) for any jewelry with wastage (VA) up to 18%. For discontinuation during the 9th month, the member will be entitled to a 40% discount on wastage (VA) for any jewelry with wastage (VA) up to 10%, limited to the accumulated gold weight/value under the plan. The customer will pay the balance wastage (VA) on the accumulated gold weight based on their average gold rate or the prevailing gold rate, whichever is lower.

If the customer discontinues during the 10th month, the member will be entitled to a 50% discount on wastage (VA) for any jewelry with wastage (VA) up to 18%, limited to the accumulated gold weight/value under the plan.
KYC is compulsory to enroll in the plan. In case of a change of address or loss of the customer receipt book, the customer should inform the company immediately and apply for a new customer receipt book with updated KYC details.
The customer may appoint a nominee upon: The customer may appoint a nominee upon submission of KYC details. For minors, the nominee's guardian will sign and will also be the nominee.
Payments of the monthly advance for the: Payments of the monthly advance for the purchase of jewelry beyond the stipulated period, or payments for more than one month, will not be allowed.
The advance for the purchase of jewelry: The advance for the purchase of jewelry can be paid, and the customer can take delivery of the selected jewelry at any CSC Jewellers showroom in Nellore.
Advance for the purchase of jewelry can: Advance for the purchase of jewelry can be made by cash, DD, debit/credit cards, NEFT/RTGS, UPI, local cheques, post-dated cheques (PDC), or cheques favoring the company. In case of cheque dishonor, the bank charges will be borne by the customer. Payments can be made at any CSC Jewellers showroom in Nellore, online at www.cscjewellers.com, or by downloading the CSC Jewellers mobile app.
Any balance advance amount will not be r: Any balance advance amount will not be refunded in cash and can only be adjusted against the purchase of gold/silver coins.
Customers who choose to pre-close within: Customers who choose to pre-close within 6 months of enrollment will not be eligible for any benefits.
Customers will be eligible for a 50% dis: Customers will be eligible for a 50% discount on wastage (VA) for any jewelry with wastage (VA) up to 18% only after they have paid all the advance payments continuously. The customer will not be able to continue if there is a default in the monthly advance payments. Therefore, it is required that the customer pays the advance payments continuously without interruption.
The customer can purchase jewelry from t: The customer can purchase jewelry from the 10th month of enrollment or before 345 days from the date of enrollment. The customer’s advance amount will be refunded if the jewelry is not purchased within 345 days from the date of enrollment.
When the customer purchases jewelry in e: When the customer purchases jewelry in excess of the accumulated weight/amount, the applicable wastage (VA) will be borne by the customer for the excess weight/amount.
GST and any other government levies at t: GST and any other government levies at the time of purchase/delivery for all sales transactions will be borne by the customer.
The customer's signature will be verifie: The customer's signature will be verified at the time of delivery.
The company, at its sole discretion, can: The company, at its sole discretion, can alter, amend, modify, add, or delete any of the terms and conditions from time to time.
All disputes are subject to the jurisdic: All disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of the competent court in Nellore.

Founded in 1971, Chinni Srinivasulu Chet: Founded in 1971, Chinni Srinivasulu Chetty Jewellers has built a lasting reputation for trust, tradition, and unmatched quality in the world of fine jewellery. Over the decades, we’ve grown from a humble beginning into a respected name among customers who value not only our exquisite designs but also the genuine relationships we’ve nurtured with them.
Under the visionary leadership of Pavan: Under the visionary leadership of Pavan Srinivas Chinni, the business has evolved to meet modern demands while staying true to its heritage. We have expanded our offerings with a perfect blend of tradition and innovation — serving both retail and wholesale jewellery needs.
Our wholesale operations, based in Chenn: Our wholesale operations, based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, supply a wide range of BIS-hallmarked gold ornaments to jewellers across South India. Every piece is crafted with meticulous attention to detail, reflecting timeless craftsmanship and evolving style.
In Nellore, Andhra Pradesh, our flagship: In Nellore, Andhra Pradesh, our flagship retail showroom brings this legacy directly to our valued customers. The store offers an exclusive collection of gold jewellery — from elegant daily wear to breathtaking bridal sets — curated to match every occasion and personality, all at transparent and competitive prices.
With a team of warm, knowledgeable, and: With a team of warm, knowledgeable, and experienced professionals, we are committed to making every visit a personalized, delightful, and memorable jewellery shopping experience.
